_translated_editions.name: The White Edition
_translated_editions.description: Get ready for an extraordinary taste experience. Red Bull White Edition with the exotic taste of coconut and fruity acai.

_translated_editions.name: The Pink Edition Sugarfree
_translated_editions.description: Red Bull Pink Edition Sugarfree: Sugarfree Energy Drink with a forest fruits taste and notes of verbena.

_translated_editions.name: The Red Edition
_translated_editions.description: Red Bull Red Edition. Let yourself be surprised by the fresh taste of watermelon.

_translated_editions.name: The Ice Edition Sugarfree
_translated_editions.description: The Red Bull Edition combines the Wings of Red Bull Energy Drink with an iced vanilla berry taste.

_translated_editions.name: The Blue Edition
_translated_editions.description: The Red Bull Blue Edition offers the taste of Juneberry.

_translated_editions.name: Energy Drink
_translated_editions.description: Red Bull is appreciated worldwide by top athletes, university students, in demanding professions and during long journeys.

_translated_editions.name: Energy Drink Sugarfree
_translated_editions.description: Wings without sugar: Red Bull Sugarfree is Red Bull Energy Drink without sugar.

_translated_editions.name: The Green Edition
_translated_editions.description: Red Bull Green Edition with the exotic taste of dragon fruit. Get ready for summer.

_translated_editions.name: The Peach Edition
_translated_editions.description: The Red Bull Peach Edition offers the taste of white peach with a touch of citrus zest and floral notes.

_translated_editions.name: The Winter Edition Sugarfree
_translated_editions.description: Red Bull Winter Sugarfree with the taste of Fuji apple and ginger.

_translated_editions.name: The Apricot Edition
_translated_editions.description: Red Bull Apricot Edition offers the perfect mix between apricot and strawberry with a note of peach.
